CONTACT US

We’re more than just accountants.

We’re partners in your business.

GET TO KNOW US

Our
Purpose

Through our accounting and HR consultancy services, start-ups can focus on getting their business off the ground. We’ll take care of complex administrative and HR work, so you can focus on what you do best.

MORE ABOUT US

Our
Philosophy.

Accounting
doesn’t have
to be hard

Most people believe that accounting involves boring data entry and budgeting. They are right. However, U Ventures take the pain away from you. With a comprehensive list of requirements and their substitutes, a full set of accounts can be generated. Remedies for accounting issues are our daily cup of tea.

Accounting
should be
affordable

U Ventures is neither a budget bookkeeper nor a boutique firm. We purely desire to assist you in your accounting needs for a fair price. Our incredible range of products and services are fully customizable.
Do seek a quote from us and we can always work out
a win-win accomplishment.

The best way
to work is as
partners

Employing basic communication lingo, U Ventures staff educates, and shares accounting knowledge as well as scenario planning with our clients. This enables U Ventures friends to comprehend their present accounting situation
in a better manner and empower them to make informed business cum accounting decisions.

Good HR
management
empowers growth

We believe in helping SME businesses in Singapore streamline Human Resource (HR) management, enhance workforce efficiency, and focus on growth despite limited resources.

We are
Specialists in

Accounting

We assist companies with the preparation of monthly, quarterly and yearly management accounts.

Taxation

With tax planning, maximization of tax benefits is possible. Our services include personal tax, corporate tax, and tax consulting.

HR Services

We offer payroll management, HR Recruitment and Outsourcing, HR policies and compliance, Executive search and more.

Training

Training courses for accounting software, payroll software and accounting practices are available at
U Ventures.

Incorporation

We provide local business incorporation services as well as overseas business incorporation service.

SEE ALL SERVICES
AND THIS IS OUR VIEW

Our office is located in the Golden Mile Tower overlooking the Singapore harbour

Get in Touch

Who
We Are

We’re young
& ambitious

We are a team of young professionals who aim to provide quality services in
the domain of accounting, secretarial and tax incentives, including but not limited to, book-keeping, incorporation of company, financial planning,
and tax savings.

Get in Touch

And we’re
with you 100%

When needed, we offer our clients information
and training with regards to accounting practices bookkeeping method as well as tax matters such
as GST and corporate tax. This gives our clients,
be it start-ups or established companies,
an advantage by keeping ahead in their industries. We also help source for grants and tax-savings alternatives to further improve
the financial standing of our clients.

Get in Touch

What
We Think.
